channel.title: Vynix Blog
channel.description: Practical guides on bug reporting, developer context, and shipping with AI coding agents.

item.title: How Vynix cuts the cost of running AI coding agents
item.description: See how Vynix gives AI coding agents the context they need up front, reducing reruns, prompt bloat, and engineer follow-up.

item.title: What a feedback layer is, and why AI teams need one
item.description: A feedback layer turns vague website bug reports into element, screenshot, console, network, and AI context your coding agents can use.

item.title: Turn a visual note into a GitHub issue in one step
item.description: See how Vynix turns a clicked UI problem into a useful GitHub issue with screenshot, element data, logs, network context, and AI diagnosis.

item.title: How Vynix Captures Console and Network Detail
item.description: See how Vynix turns clicked website bugs into clear developer context with element data, screenshots, console logs, network details, and AI diagnosis.

item.title: Using the Vynix MCP Server With Your AI Agent
item.description: Connect Vynix annotations to an AI agent through MCP, with the clicked element, screenshot, console logs, network context, and diagnosis.

item.title: Collecting Website Feedback From Clients and Teammates
item.description: A practical guide to collecting clear website feedback from clients and teammates, with less back-and-forth and better dev context.

item.title: How Vynix works, from a click to a fix
item.description: See how Vynix turns a website click into element context, screenshots, console and network clues, AI diagnosis, and GitHub-ready fixes.

item.title: Point and click feedback on any web page
item.description: Use Vynix to click a page bug and capture the element, screenshot, console, network context, and AI root-cause diagnosis.

item.title: Review rounds: turn notes into a short fix list
item.description: Learn how to turn messy website review feedback into clear, buildable fixes with better context, grouping, and Vynix annotations.

item.title: Region and element screenshots in Vynix
item.description: See how Vynix screenshots connect visual bugs to the exact element, console logs, network calls, and AI context your agent needs.

item.title: Projects, roles and sharing in Vynix
item.description: Learn how to organize Vynix projects, define team roles, and share website issues with the context developers need.

item.title: How to Install Vynix on Any Website
item.description: Add Vynix to your site, verify the widget, and start sending annotated bugs with element, screenshot, console, and network context.

item.title: How to connect GitHub and hand work to Copilot
item.description: Connect GitHub to Vynix, turn website bugs into useful issues, and give Copilot the context it needs to start fixing them.

item.title: Vynix plans, and how to pick the right one
item.description: Compare Vynix free and paid plans, learn what changes as teams grow, and pick the best fit for your bug triage workflow.

item.title: What We Are Building Next at Vynix
item.description: A clear look at Vynix's next directions: richer bug context, deeper agent workflows, and integrations. See shipped updates at vynix.in.

item.title: How to write bug reports an AI coding agent can fix
item.description: Learn how to write precise bug reports with UI, console, network, and reproduction context so AI coding agents can make real fixes.

item.title: The Context an AI Agent Needs to Fix a Front-End Bug
item.description: Learn what front-end bug context an AI coding agent needs, from DOM details to console logs, network calls, screenshots, and repo hints.

item.title: From Reported Bug to Merged Fix
item.description: A practical walkthrough of using Vynix to capture bug context, create a clear GitHub issue, guide a coding agent, and verify the fix.

item.title: Who Vynix is for, and the problems it solves
item.description: See who Vynix helps, from product teams to AI coding workflows, and how it turns vague website bugs into actionable developer context.

item.title: Reading the Vynix AI Diagnosis and Found Files
item.description: Learn how to review a Vynix AI diagnosis, check the captured evidence, and turn found files into a clear fix prompt or GitHub issue.
